definition: Breaker block + FVG overlap — one of the highest-probability entry patterns in ICT methodology. The unicorn model combines a violated order block (now acting as a breaker) with the fair value gap created during the violation. This double confluence zone is where institutional re-entry occurs.
depends_on: order_blocks (the original OB that gets violated)
breaker_blocks (the OB becomes a breaker when violated)
fair_value_gaps (FVG created by the displacement that broke the OB)
displacement (the force that breaks through the OB must be displacement-grade)
feeds_into: entry_models (unicorn = Grade A entry zone automatically)
PD_arrays (unicorn = triple-stacked PD arrays — breaker + FVG + former OB)
related_to: consequent_encroachment (CE of unicorn zone = ultimate precision entry)
mitigation_blocks (first touch of unicorn zone = mitigation event)

formation_chain.step_1: Order Block forms — the last opposing candle before a move
formation_chain.step_2: Price returns to the OB zone (expected to hold)
formation_chain.step_3: Price breaks THROUGH the OB with displacement (3+ ATR candle)
formation_chain.step_4: The violated OB becomes a Breaker Block (polarity flipped)
formation_chain.step_5: The displacement that broke the OB creates a Fair Value Gap
formation_chain.step_6: The overlap zone of Breaker + FVG = UNICORN ENTRY ZONE
formation_chain.summary: OB → violation → breaker (flipped) + FVG (from violation) → overlap = unicorn

bullish_unicorn.formation: Bearish OB violated to the upside → becomes bullish breaker. Upside displacement creates bullish FVG. Overlap = bullish unicorn.
bullish_unicorn.entry: Buy at unicorn zone (breaker + FVG overlap). Limit order at CE of the overlap.
bullish_unicorn.sl: Below the unicorn zone low (the breaker block extreme)

bearish_unicorn.formation: Bullish OB violated to the downside → becomes bearish breaker. Downside displacement creates bearish FVG. Overlap = bearish unicorn.
bearish_unicorn.entry: Sell at unicorn zone (breaker + FVG overlap). Limit order at CE of the overlap.
bearish_unicorn.sl: Above the unicorn zone high (the breaker block extreme)

why_unicorn_works.reason_1: Double confluence — two independent institutional signals (breaker + FVG) at the same price
why_unicorn_works.reason_2: The violation of the OB confirms structural change — this is a REVERSAL zone
why_unicorn_works.reason_3: FVG ensures there's a genuine imbalance (unfilled orders) at the zone
why_unicorn_works.reason_4: Breaker ensures the opposing side has been stopped out — less resistance to the new direction
why_unicorn_works.combined: Breaker removes opposing pressure + FVG adds supporting orders = highest-probability entry

perfect_unicorn: Displacement through OB was 3+ ATR (strong institutional force)
FVG is clean (no partial fills — gap is fully intact)
First touch of the unicorn zone (virgin — unmitigated)
Occurs during kill zone with HTF bias alignment
imperfect_unicorn: Displacement was weak (1-2 ATR) — still valid but lower confidence
FVG partially filled before price returns — zone is weakened
Second touch — still tradeable but reduce size

time_windows.best_in: Silver Bullet windows (10:00-11:00 ET, 14:00-15:00 ET) — unicorn formed during Silver Bullet = A+
time_windows.avoid_in: Lunch hour (12:00-13:30 ET) — low liquidity unicorns have lower reaction probability
time_windows.hold_time: Unicorn zones on M15 valid for current session. On H4/Daily valid for days.

scoring.retested_unicorn: +5 to ICT score (still strong but weaker)

bridge_integration.detection: When an OB is violated (breaker created) AND a FVG exists within the breaker zone → flag as unicorn
bridge_integration.auto_grade: Unicorn with kill zone + HTF alignment = automatic Grade A regardless of other scores
bridge_integration.entry_method: Limit order at CE of the overlap zone
bridge_integration.priority: Unicorn zones get highest priority in the entry queue — trade these before standard setups
